items.recommended_next_action: Intake staff should confirm or release the soft hold for Thursday May 1 at 3:30 PM with Maya Chen, initiate BCBS prior authorization, send new patient intake forms to Daniel Lee, and review the staged draft reply before sending.
items.draft_reply:
Dear Daniel,

Thank you for choosing Cedar Kids Therapy for Emma's care. We have received the referral from Dr. Priya Nair at Northside Pediatrics and are excited to support Emma.

We have identified a potential appointment time for her speech-language evaluation that aligns with your availability:

• Day/Time: Thursday, May 1, 2026 at 3:30 PM
• Provider: Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP
• Service: Speech-Language Evaluation (articulation)

Please note that this time is currently on a soft hold pending staff review — it is not yet confirmed. A member of our team will be in touch shortly to confirm the appointment, walk you through any intake paperwork, and review your insurance details (Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO).

Please note that your plan may require prior authorization, so our team will handle that process on your behalf before your visit.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach us at the front desk.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: Referral was complete with all required fields (child name, DOB, parent contact, payer, member ID). search_patient returned no match — confirmed new patient. verify_insurance returned in_network for BCBS PPO with auth_required=true and a $30 copay. find_slots returned 4 SLP evaluation slots; the Thursday May 1 at 3:30 PM slot with Maya Chen was selected as the best match for the family's stated after-school Tuesday/Thursday preference. hold_slot was called per all gate criteria being met (in-network, valid slot_id, not P0, not clinical question, contact info present). Soft hold ID: hold_01ktpyt4hmx715zqbvk554k54v. Intake task created due 2026-04-28 covering auth, forms, and hold confirmation. Draft reply staged for staff review — not sent. No safeguarding, language access, or clinical advice concerns identified.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must call Maria Gomez at 555-0102 within the hour to assess safeguarding concern and determine mandatory reporting obligations — do NOT discuss scheduling or therapy during this callback.
items.draft_reply: Hi, this is Cedar Kids Therapy returning a call for Maria Gomez. Thank you for reaching out to us. A staff member will be in touch with you shortly. Please feel free to call us back at your convenience.

escalation.reason: Caller disclosed that the child's father has been 'getting rough with him during weekends' — language indicating possible physical harm or unsafe caregiving directed at a 6-year-old child. Safeguarding protocol requires immediate clinical lead review.

items.decision_rationale: The phrase 'his dad started getting rough with him during weekends' unambiguously triggers the P0 safeguarding threshold: it describes unsafe caregiving and possible physical harm directed at the child. Per the urgency decision tree, all scheduling activity (find_slots, verify_insurance, hold_slot) was halted immediately. Safeguarding policy was looked up, a P0 escalation was filed (esc_01ktpystjg15y9tvbpp8yfq4ce), and a same-hour task was created for the clinical lead (task_01ktpystjhrqhd0de3942mpdmc) to assess mandatory reporting obligations. The draft acknowledgment is strictly neutral — it does not reference the concern, mention therapy, or imply any appointment is being arranged. No DOB was available so search_patient was not called. No scheduling or insurance steps were taken.

args.reason: Caller disclosed that the child's father has been "getting rough with him during weekends" — language indicating possible physical harm or unsafe caregiving directed at a 6-year-old child. Safeguarding protocol requires immediate clinical lead review.

args.notes: URGENT — same-hour review required. Voicemail received 2026-04-27 at 7:43pm from Maria Gomez (mother), phone 555-0102. She disclosed that the child's father has been "getting rough with him during weekends." Child is Leo Gomez, age 6 (no DOB provided). This language meets the P0 safeguarding threshold per clinic policy. Do NOT discuss scheduling or therapy in the callback. Clinical lead must assess whether mandatory reporting obligations apply and determine the appropriate next steps. Do NOT delegate this callback to front desk.
args.title: P0 SAFEGUARDING — Possible child harm disclosure (Leo, age 6)

args.body: Hi, this is Cedar Kids Therapy returning a call for Maria Gomez. Thank you for reaching out to us. A staff member will be in touch with you shortly. Please feel free to call us back at your convenience.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing team to contact Rachel Brooks to conduct a benefits conversation regarding out-of-network Kaiser HMO coverage before any scheduling can proceed (task_01ktpysw4xcsd1jactmasmq6fy).
items.draft_reply:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for choosing Cedar Kids Therapy for Owen's care. We received the referral from Dr. Helena Yu at Westside Pediatrics and are glad to welcome you.

Before we can schedule Owen's occupational therapy evaluation, we wanted to let you know that after reviewing your insurance information, we found that Kaiser HMO is currently not in our network. This means we'll need to have a brief benefits conversation with you to explore your options — which may include out-of-network benefits through your plan, or alternative payment arrangements.

A member of our billing team will be reaching out to you shortly at 555-0103 or via this email to walk you through next steps. We want to make sure this process is as smooth as possible for your family.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: Referral is complete with all required fields (DOB, parent contact, payer, member ID), so missing_paperwork classification was not triggered. search_patient returned no match, confirming this is a new patient — classified as new_referral. verify_insurance returned out_of_network for Kaiser HMO (KSR-4471); Kaiser HMO is also not listed among Cedar Kids Therapy's known in-network payers. Per the insurance gate rule, find_slots and hold_slot were NOT called. A billing task was created due 2026-04-28 for a benefits conversation, and a draft email was prepared for Rachel Brooks explaining the OON status and next steps. No safeguarding, P0, or P1 triggers were present. Family preference for mornings was noted in the referral and recorded but cannot be used for scheduling until the insurance issue is resolved.

args.notes: New OT referral received from Dr. Helena Yu (Westside Pediatrics) for Owen Brooks (DOB: 2020-02-11). Insurance verified as OUT-OF-NETWORK: Kaiser HMO, Member ID KSR-4471. Per policy, a benefits conversation must be completed with the family before any scheduling can occur. Parent contact: Rachel Brooks, 555-0103, rachel.brooks@example.com. No slot has been held. Please contact the family to review out-of-network benefits, self-pay options, or any other coverage pathways.
args.title: OON Insurance - Benefits Conversation Required: Owen Brooks

items.decision_rationale: Both child name and DOB were present, so search_patient was called first. A match was found for pat_mateo_ramirez_jr (Mateo Ramirez Jr., DOB 2019-03-15). Two discrepancies were flagged: (1) the referral omits 'Jr.' from the child's name, and (2) the guardian on file is Sofia Ramirez, while the sender identifies as Carla Mendez. PT is not listed as an active service for this patient, so this is classified as new_referral rather than existing_patient_request. Insurance verified in-network (Aetna PPO, AET-9910; $30 copay; auth required). All in-network hold conditions were met, so find_slots and hold_slot were called — soft hold placed on slot_pt_priya_2026_04_29_1300 pending staff review and resolution of discrepancies. An intake task was created due Tuesday flagging both discrepancies and the auth requirement. Draft reply to Carla Mendez is neutral and does not confirm an appointment. No safeguarding, clinical, or language access triggers present.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Difficulty producing R sounds at age 4

items.recommended_next_action: Staff should review and send the drafted portal reply inviting Jordan Kim to schedule an SLP screening or evaluation if she wishes to proceed.
items.draft_reply:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We appreciate you sharing your question about Ava.

Clinical questions like yours are best addressed through a formal evaluation or a brief screening with one of our licensed speech-language pathologists — they're the right people to give you personalized, accurate guidance about Ava's speech development.

If you'd like, we'd be happy to schedule a speech-language screening or evaluation for Ava. This would give our clinician the opportunity to assess her directly and answer your questions thoroughly.

Please let us know if you'd like to move forward, and we'll get the process started for you!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: The parent explicitly asked for clinical advice ('is it normal?', 'should I be worried?', 'should we wait?') and stated she is not ready to book ('I would appreciate advice before booking anything'). Per the clinical advice prohibition, no developmental milestone information or developmental reassurance may be included in any reply. Classification is clinical_question at P3 (low urgency — informational, no same-day operational need). search_patient was NOT called because only an age ('4-year-old') was provided, not a date of birth — age alone does not meet the DOB threshold. find_slots and hold_slot were NOT called because (a) this is a clinical question and (b) the parent has not requested an appointment. The draft message thanks the parent, redirects clinical questions to a formal evaluation or screening, and offers a path to schedule — fully compliant with policy.

args.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We appreciate you sharing your question about Ava.

Clinical questions like yours are best addressed through a formal evaluation or a brief screening with one of our licensed speech-language pathologists — they're the right people to give you personalized, accurate guidance about Ava's speech development.

If you'd like, we'd be happy to schedule a speech-language screening or evaluation for Ava. This would give our clinician the opportunity to assess her directly and answer your questions thoroughly.

Please let us know if you'd like to move forward, and we'll get the process started for you!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Staff should review and send the drafted message to Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics requesting the four missing fields before any further processing.
items.draft_reply:
Dear Dr. Keene,

Thank you for referring Sam Taylor to Cedar Kids Therapy for a speech-language pathology evaluation. We received your fax referral and are happy to move forward; however, we are unable to process the referral at this time because the following required fields were blank:

  1. Child's date of birth
  2. Parent/guardian name and contact information
  3. Insurance payer name
  4. Insurance member ID

Could you or your office please resubmit the referral with these details at your earliest convenience? Once we have the complete information, we will promptly verify insurance and reach out to the family to schedule.

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact our intake team. We look forward to working with your patient.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy – Intake Team
items.decision_rationale: All four required intake fields (DOB, parent/guardian contact, insurance payer, member ID) are explicitly blank in the fax referral, triggering the missing_paperwork classification. Per policy, search_patient was NOT called because no DOB is present (a child name alone is insufficient). verify_insurance, find_slots, and hold_slot were all correctly bypassed. The draft message is addressed to Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics — not to the parent — because parent contact information is unknown. The intake task is due today (2026-04-28) to ensure prompt follow-up. No safeguarding or clinical advice concerns were identified. Urgency is P2 (standard new referral with missing info).

args.notes: Fax referral received 2026-04-28 from Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics (item_6). Referral is incomplete and CANNOT be processed until all missing fields are received. Concern: speech delay in a school-age child. Action: await completed referral from Dr. Keene's office before proceeding with insurance verification or scheduling. Do NOT call verify_insurance or find_slots until all fields are provided.

Hemos recibido su mensaje y estamos trabajando en su solicitud de evaluación de habla. Tenemos disponibilidad con Lucia Morales, una terapeuta de lenguaje que habla español, el jueves 30 de abril a las 11:00 a.m. Un miembro de nuestro equipo la contactará hoy para confirmar esta cita y también para solicitarle la fecha de nacimiento de Isabella, que necesitamos para completar el registro.

Si tiene alguna pregunta o necesita contactarnos, puede llamarnos al número de nuestra oficina. Gracias y esperamos hablar con usted pronto.

items.draft_reply:
Hi Anita,

Thank you for letting us know — we're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well!

We've received your message about today's 3pm OT appointment and a staff member will be in touch shortly to help get Noah rescheduled at a time that works for your family.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out at 555-0108 or reply to this email.

We hope Noah feels better soon!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: Message requests a same-day reschedule of today's 3pm OT appointment, triggering P1 per the urgency decision tree. Patient name and DOB were both present, so search_patient was called first — Noah Patel (pat_noah_patel) was confirmed as an active patient and guardian name 'Anita Patel' matches the record exactly, no discrepancy to flag. Cancellation policy was looked up and confirms that makeup availability requires staff review, so find_slots and hold_slot were correctly NOT called. A same-day front desk task was created with full context. A draft acknowledgement email was prepared for staff review — it is warm and empathetic but does not reference clinical details or imply an appointment has been booked. No escalation needed; P1 is handled operationally.
